reviews.comment:
Excelente la atención en el Shop pero hace tres días que no tienen combustible!!! Aguante YPF!!!

(Translated by Google)
The service at the shop was excellent, but they haven't had fuel for three days!!! Go YPF!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNaX2JqNFlnEAE

Muy limpio

(Translated by Google)
Very clean
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNaN2M2OVh3EAE

reviews.comment:
Un asco. No se salva ni una sola factura.  Cambie las 5 distintas facturas y todas duras o viejas para ser el acá una vergüenza.  No pedí un reembolso por vergüenza ajena. Desastroso acá deja q desear ni hablar de la atención tema aparte.....

(Translated by Google)
Disgusting. Not a single receipt was any good. I exchanged five different receipts, and they were all either old or worn out. It's a disgrace. I didn't ask for a refund because I was embarrassed for them. This place is a disaster, it leaves much to be desired, not to mention the customer service...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNaeFlibTFBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente servicio!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNaMGFmYmF3EAE

reviews.comment:
Gracias. Q se abre una shell  cerca. El dueño no quiere poner más trabajadores en el otro surtidor.  O sea. Uno solo 2 personas y cola para cargar nafta. Más de 30 minutos en espera.

(Translated by Google)
Thanks. A Shell station is opening nearby. The owner doesn't want to hire more staff at the other station. So, there are only two people working there, and a line to fill up. More than 30 minutes waiting.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNaN29QM2J3EAE

reviews.comment:
Buen servicio, hay algo de espera pero es normal dado el alto tránsito de la ruta 9

(Translated by Google)
Good service, there is some waiting but that's normal given the high traffic on Route 9
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNaaXQ2anlnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pase a la noche para cargar combustible, un solo playero, más de 30 minutos de espera.

(Translated by Google)
I stopped at night to refuel, there was only one attendant, and I waited more than 30 minutes.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNab29qMXRBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Están abierto toda la.noche

(Translated by Google)
They are open all night
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNaMUltbGhnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Personal muy cordiales, solo pase a cargar combustible, si bien habia muchos autos, fueron rapidos en la atencion. PD: compramos unos salamines a un vendedor ambulante que te dejaba probarlos, ese muy rico, el que compre al menos yo estaba un poco seco de mas.

(Translated by Google)
The staff were very friendly. I only stopped to fill up my tank, and although there were many cars, they were quick to serve me. PS: We bought some salami from a street vendor who let you try it; it was very tasty. The one I bought was a bit too dry.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURwNzlmSDZRRRAB
